name: Strawberries Italian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the strawberries and remove the tops.
2. Peel the peaches if using them.
3. Slice the peaches into medium-sized pieces.
4. Add all of the fruit to a bowl and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Add lemon juice, orange juice, Port, and wine.
6. Mix thoroughly and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
7. Serve in chilled glass cups.
